title: Pale Flower
writer: Shintarô Ishihara, Masaru Baba, Masahiro Shinoda
actors: Ryô Ikebe, Mariko Kaga, Takashi Fujiki
plot: A gangster gets released from prison and has to cope with the recent shifts of power between the gangs, while taking care of a thrill-seeking young woman, who got in bad company while gambling.
